_doc: COMPREHENSIVE routing, assigned ONCE from the full DPV scheme list and AIRO/VAIR root list (not from failures). Every DPV class scheme is assigned to the slot whose content-kind it holds: PREDICATE = processing operations; OBJECT = anything a duty acts on (data, measures, notices, entities/roles, rights, risk, contracts); CONDITION = preconditions/triggers (legal bases, consent, purposes, context, scale, jurisdiction, statuses). Two schemes are deliberately excluded as non-content and documented below. Because the routing is now complete by construction, a value that fails to map is a GENUINE vocabulary gap (the finding), not an un-routed scheme.

_excluded_schemes.dpv:rules-classes: deontic meta-layer (Obligation/Prohibition/Recommendation) = the modality slot, not content
_excluded_schemes.dpv:process-classes: abstract process types (Process/Service) redundant with processing-classes; would only double-emit
